title: extract_response clones entire args Value before deserializing
description: In client.rs, extract_response does: serde_json::from_value(args.clone()). The clone is forced because resp is borrowed as &JmapResponse, but the call sites in methods.rs never use resp again after the extract_response call. Two options to eliminate the clone: (1) Change the call sites to pass the JmapResponse by value and destructure it to extract the matching invocation without cloning; or (2) use serde_json::from_str on the re-serialized args (worse). Option 1 is the right fix. For large responses (e.g., Message/get returning many messages with attachments), this clone deep-copies the entire parsed JSON tree before immediately deserializing it into the target type and discarding the copy. The impact is proportional to response size.
